rationale: Records the Bun-native API preference for the C1 playable parity product. Every downstream step must prefer Bun-native APIs (`Bun.file`, `Bun.write`, `Bun.serve`, `Bun.argv`, `Bun.env`, `Bun.sleep`, `Bun.spawn`, `bun:test`, `bun:ffi`, `bun:sqlite`) over their Node standard-library equivalents whenever both exist. Pins the import group order (`bun:*` → `node:*` → third-party → relative) that follows from that preference. Cross-references D-FPS-003 runtime command `bun run doom.ts`, D-FPS-006 Bun-only runtime policy, and the 00-002 control center. Records the current workspace posture: `tsconfig.json` declares `types: ["bun"]`, `package.json` declares no Node-only FFI shim (ffi-napi, node-ffi, node-addon-api) or Node-only SQLite binding (better-sqlite3, sqlite3) as a dependency, and the FFI provider is the `@bun-win32` scope (`@bun-win32/core`, `@bun-win32/gdi32`, `@bun-win32/kernel32`, `@bun-win32/user32`, `@bun-win32/winmm`).

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.file
preferredBunApis.purpose: Read files lazily through a BunFile handle.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.write
preferredBunApis.purpose: Write files through a BunFile handle or Response/Blob input.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.serve
preferredBunApis.purpose: Run an HTTP/WebSocket server on Bun's native server.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.argv
preferredBunApis.purpose: Read the Bun process argv without Node `process.argv`.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.env
preferredBunApis.purpose: Read the Bun process environment without Node `process.env`.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.sleep
preferredBunApis.purpose: Await a promise-based sleep without wrapping Node `setTimeout`.

preferredBunApis.name: Bun.spawn
preferredBunApis.purpose: Spawn a subprocess with Bun's native spawn.

importGroupOrder.description: Bun builtin modules imported via the `bun:` scheme.
Node standard library modules imported via the `node:` scheme.
